Electoral Accountability and Public Opinion Research

Thu, April 23, 8:00 to 9:30am CDT (8:00 to 9:30am CDT), TBA

Session Submission Type: Paper Session

Section

  • 02. Representation & Electoral Systems

Chair

  • 8:00am |

    Shahana Sheikh, University of Pennsylvania

Individual Presentations

  • 8:05am |

    Institutional Trust, Political Participation and Social Structure in India - Abhishek Priyadarshi, Indian Institute of Management Indore; Ajit Phadnis, Phadnis, Indian Institute of Management Indore

  • 8:18am |

    Intra-Government Democracy and Policy Responsiveness to Public Opinion - Tobias Böhmelt, University of Essex; Lawrence Ezrow, University of Essex

  • 8:31am |

    Paths to Legitimacy: Public Opinion and Policy Change through Referendums and Legislatures - Eli Rau, Tecnologico de Monterrey; Radha Sarkar, Tecnologico de Monterrey; Shahana Sheikh, University of Pennsylvania; Susan Stokes, University of Chicago

  • 8:44am |

    Policy professionals and unequal representation - Anne Skorkjær Binderkrantz, Aarhus University; Søren Frank Etzerodt, Aarhus University

Discussants

  • 8:57am |

    Sofia Marini, Aarhus University

  • 8:57am |

    Tevfik Murat Yildirim, University of Stavanger

Audience Participation

  • 9:10am |

    Audience participation will last for the remainder of the session.
